name: JSON列-fis单值匹配
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tags, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', '["red", "blue"]', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tags, tenant_code) VALUES (2, 'NO2', 2, 200, 'done', '["green"]', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: JSON列-fis多值匹配(OR)
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tags, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', '["red", "blue"]', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tags, tenant_code) VALUES (2, 'NO2', 2, 200, 'done', '["green"]', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: JSON列-fis无匹配返回0行
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_order (id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, tags, tenant_code) VALUES (1, 'NO1', 1, 100, 'pending', '["red"]', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_order WHERE id IN (1)
